PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT ?provinceLabel(COUNT(DISTINCT ?emperor) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?emperor wdt:P39 wd:Q378427 .
  ?emperor wdt:P19 ?birthplace .
  ?birthplace wdt:P131 ?province .
  ?province wdt:P31 wd:Q7150293 ; rdfs:label ?provinceLabel .
  FILTER(lang(?provinceLabel) = 'en')
  .
  ?emperor p:P39 ?pos .
  ?pos ps:P39 wd:Q378427 ; pq:P580 ?reignStart .
  FILTER(STR(?reignStart) >= "+0000100-")
}
GROUP BY ?provinceLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
